locations.name: 菲律宾
locations.summary: 菲律賓共和國（他加祿語：Republika ng Pilipinas；英語：Republic of the Philippines）簡稱菲律賓，是東南亞的群島國家。位於西太平洋，北隔呂宋海峽與臺灣相望，南隔西里伯斯海與印度尼西亚相望，西隔…

locations.name: 巴納豪火山
locations.summary: 巴納豪火山是菲律賓的火山，位於呂宋島南部，海拔高度2,170米，山體由安山岩組成，火山口長3.5公里、寬1.5公里，最近一次火山噴發在1843年發生。 外部連結 Philippine Institute of Volcanology an…

locations.name: Samar Island Natural Park
locations.summary: The Samar Island Natural Park, in Samar, is the largest contiguous tract of old-growth forest in the Philippines.

relations.subject: Grey-throated sunbird
relations.evidence: It is found in a wide range of semi-open wooded habitats in the northern and eastern part of the Philippines

relations.subject: Grey-throated sunbird
relations.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Bataan National Park, Mount Banahaw, Samar Island Natural Park, Mount Makiling and Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park but like all areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation continues despite this protection on paper
